chunks.text: Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick tells a hilarious Air Force One story
Full scope of the Commerce Department
How Trump's tariff agenda was planned and executed, how it's going

Pharma deals, lowering costs for Americans
Focus on fraud, immigration, gold cards
GDP: Could we see 5 or 6% growth in 2026?
